summary.lv: Zabbix meklē Service Delivery inženieri, kas sniegs tehnisko atbalstu klientiem visā pasaulē, ieviesīs un konfigurēs Zabbix monitoringa risinājumus, kā arī gatavos tehnisko dokumentāciju.
summary.en: Zabbix is hiring a Service Delivery Engineer to provide technical support to international customers, implement and configure Zabbix monitoring deployments, and produce technical documentation.
